session.user: Run `make all-ci` in `/home/runner/work/erk/erk` and report the full results including any failures. Do not fix anything - just report what you find. This may take several minutes.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run all CI checks including tests, linting, and formatting

session.assistant:
Perfect! Here are the full results of `make all-ci`:
## CI Results Summary
**Status: ALL PASSED**
### Breakdown by Component:
1. **Lint**: Passed - All checks passed!
2. **Format Check**: Passed - 1739 files already formatted
3. **Prettier Check**: Passed - All matched files use Prettier code style!
4. **Markdown Check**: Passed
5. **Docs Check**: Passed
6. **Exec Reference Check**: Passed - `.claude/skills/erk-exec/reference.md` is up to date
7. **Type Checking (ty)**: Passed - All checks passed!
8. **Unit Tests (erk)**: Passed - 5913 tests passed in 14.24s
9. **Integration Tests (erk)**: Passed - 349 tests passed in 15.66s
10. **Tests (erk-dev)**: Passed - 138 tests passed in 5.48s
11. **Tests (erk-statusline)**: Passed - 123 tests passed in 0.77s
12. **Tests (erk-mcp)**: Passed - AGENTS.md standard: PASSED - All CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md files properly paired - 19 CLAUDE.md files checked, 0 violations
13. **Agent Docs Health Check**: Passed - Frontmatter validation passed (585 files) - Generated files in sync - 585 files validated, 57 generated files
**Total Test Coverage**: 6523 tests passed **Total Time**: ~36 seconds combined
No failures or issues detected.
